game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Deus Ex GO is a turn-based stealth puzzle game where players control agent Adam Jensen by tapping on adjacent grid spaces to move him one step at a time. After each player move, all enemies on the map also move one step according to their patrol patterns or AI logic, creating a dynamic puzzle environment. The core objective is to reach an exit point on the grid, requiring players to utilize stealth to avoid enemy line-of-sight, hack terminals to control turrets or alter level layouts, and activate augmentations like temporary invisibility for 1 turn. Progression unfolds across over 50 story puzzles, introducing new enemy types such as guards, turrets, drones, and walkers, each with distinct movement and attack patterns that increase strategic complexity. Daily challenges and an "Infinite Play" mode with procedurally generated puzzles provide continuous content, while a Puzzle Creator allows players to design and share their own levels.
game_info.description: Guide Adam Jensen through a dangerous grid-based facility to reach the exit. This is a turn-based stealth puzzle game where every move you make triggers enemy movement. Avoid enemy line-of-sight, hack terminals to disable turrets, and use augmentations like temporary invisibility to survive. Plan your moves carefully - enemies patrol in patterns, and getting caught means game over. Complete increasingly challenging levels with new enemy types and obstacles.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Adam Jensen one grid space in the chosen direction (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Space: Activate temporary invisibility augmentation (1 turn, limited uses)
Z: Hack adjacent terminal to toggle turrets on/off
Shift: Wait (skip turn without moving)
Enter: Start game from START screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to START screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and validates that the player can move in all four directions on the grid. Ensures that turn-based system works correctly where enemies move after player moves.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Execute a series of movements in all four cardinal directions to explore the grid. Verify that position updates correctly and that the turn counter increments properly after each move.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves in all directions without errors. Position coordinates update correctly in gameState. Turn counter increments. No crashes or invalid states occur during movement.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement mechanics and validates that the player can move in all four directions on the grid. Ensures that turn-based system works correctly where enemies move after player moves.
TEST_1.strategy: Execute a series of movements in all four cardinal directions to explore the grid. Verify that position updates correctly and that the turn counter increments properly after each move.
TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves in all directions without errors. Position coordinates update correctly in gameState. Turn counter increments. No crashes or invalid states occur during movement.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win condition by navigating to the exit while avoiding enemies. This validates pathfinding, stealth mechanics, and proper game phase transition to GAME_OVER_WIN.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use intelligent pathfinding to navigate toward the exit while monitoring enemy positions and line-of-sight. Use invisibility augmentation when necessary to bypass dangerous areas. Reach the exit tile to trigger win condition.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player successfully reaches the exit without being detected by enemies. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Win message displays with final score and turn count.
TEST_2.description: Tests the complete win condition by navigating to the exit while avoiding enemies. This validates pathfinding, stealth mechanics, and proper game phase transition to GAME_OVER_WIN.
TEST_2.strategy: Use intelligent pathfinding to navigate toward the exit while monitoring enemy positions and line-of-sight. Use invisibility augmentation when necessary to bypass dangerous areas. Reach the exit tile to trigger win condition.
TEST_2.expected: Player successfully reaches the exit without being detected by enemies. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Win message displays with final score and turn count.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests the hacking mechanic by attempting to hack terminals to disable turrets. Validates that turrets can be toggled and that this affects gameplay.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Move adjacent to a terminal and press Z to hack it. Verify that nearby turrets toggle their active state. Test multiple hacks to ensure the toggle works both ways.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Hacking successfully toggles turret states. Disabled turrets no longer threaten the player. Terminal visual state updates to reflect hacked status. No errors occur during hack attempts.
TEST_3.description: Tests the hacking mechanic by attempting to hack terminals to disable turrets. Validates that turrets can be toggled and that this affects gameplay.
TEST_3.strategy: Move adjacent to a terminal and press Z to hack it. Verify that nearby turrets toggle their active state. Test multiple hacks to ensure the toggle works both ways.
TEST_3.expected: Hacking successfully toggles turret states. Disabled turrets no longer threaten the player. Terminal visual state updates to reflect hacked status. No errors occur during hack attempts.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests the invisibility augmentation mechanic. Validates that using invisibility prevents enemy detection for one turn and that the limited charges system works correctly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Move into a dangerous position where enemies would normally detect the player. Activate invisibility before being spotted. Move through enemy line-of-sight while invisible. Verify charge consumption.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Invisibility prevents detection for exactly one turn. Charges decrement correctly. Visual feedback shows invisibility is active. Game doesn't allow using invisibility when charges are depleted.
TEST_4.description: Tests the invisibility augmentation mechanic. Validates that using invisibility prevents enemy detection for one turn and that the limited charges system works correctly.
TEST_4.strategy: Move into a dangerous position where enemies would normally detect the player. Activate invisibility before being spotted. Move through enemy line-of-sight while invisible. Verify charge consumption.
TEST_4.expected: Invisibility prevents detection for exactly one turn. Charges decrement correctly. Visual feedback shows invisibility is active. Game doesn't allow using invisibility when charges are depleted.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests enemy detection and game over condition. Validates that moving into enemy line-of-sight without invisibility triggers GAME_OVER_LOSE state.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Deliberately move into an enemy's line-of-sight without using any defensive augmentations. Verify that the enemy detects the player and triggers game over.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Enemy successfully detects player when in line-of-sight. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Lose message displays. Game state correctly reflects the loss condition.
TEST_5.description: Tests enemy detection and game over condition. Validates that moving into enemy line-of-sight without invisibility triggers GAME_OVER_LOSE state.
